# secureElementInfo

**Instance Property**

A property that provides information about the Secure Element hardware.

## Declaration

```swift
var secureElementInfo: CredentialSession.SecureElementInfo { get async throws }
```

## Discussion

You can use the certificate in the [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/SecureElementInfo-swift.struct] to authenticate against the Certification Authority of the Secure Element hardware.

## Accessing hardware information

- **CredentialSession.SecureElementInfo**: A type that provides information about the Secure Element hardware.
